value.stringValue: ACTION REQUIRED - New National Account Site Request Submitted
Your request has been submitted successfully

Flow.interviewLabel: Account - National Account New Site Request {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: National Account New Site Request

fields.name: Site_Name
fields.fieldText: Site Name (Naming convention: National Account – Site Name – Location – (Site Number or ID if Needed) (Maximum 80 characters.)

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Oops...an error has occurred while submitting your request.


Jobscience administrator has been notified.

textTemplates.name: Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
New national account site request received. Click on the link below to review and approve the request.

{!$Label.System_URL}{!Staging_Record_ID}
